name: Garden Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Ground turkey or lean beef
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine egg white and bread crumbs (if using beef, stir in 2 tbsp water).
2. Stir in carrot, onion, green pepper, salt, and pepper.
3. Add Parmesan cheese and ground meat; mix well.
4. Shape the meat mixture into four patties that are 3/4 inch thick.
5. Spray a cold grill rack with Pam. Place the rack on the grill.
6. Grill burgers over uncovered grill directly over medium coals for 7 minutes.
7. Turn and grill for an additional 8-11 minutes, or until no pink remains.
8. Place one tomato slice atop each burger and grill for 1 minute more.
